title: App crashes on save
body: The application crashes immediately after pressing save in the ticket form.
label: bug

title: Login fails after deployment
body: Users cannot log in after the latest production deployment.
label: bug

title: Payment service outage
body: Critical outage in production. Payment failed for multiple users.
label: bug

title: Dashboard shows server error
body: The dashboard returns a 500 error when loading analytics widgets.
label: bug

title: File upload fails for PDF documents
body: Uploading PDF attachments fails with an unexpected validation error.
label: bug

title: Search results not loading
body: The search page remains blank and results never load for some users.
label: bug

title: Notifications duplicated
body: Users receive the same notification multiple times after one action.
label: bug

title: API returns timeout on ticket list
body: The ticket list endpoint times out when many records are requested.
label: bug

title: User session expires too early
body: User sessions end after a few minutes despite active usage.
label: bug

title: Export to CSV creates empty file
body: CSV export completes but the downloaded file is empty.
label: bug

title: Add dark mode
body: Users would like a dark mode option in the web application.
label: feature

title: Support Slack notifications
body: The platform should send ticket updates to Slack channels.
label: feature

title: Implement ticket tagging
body: Users need the ability to tag tickets for easier filtering.
label: feature

title: Add dashboard filters
body: The analytics dashboard should allow filtering by team and status.
label: feature

title: Bulk ticket assignment
body: Agents should be able to assign multiple tickets at once.
label: feature

title: Add comment mentions
body: Users should be able to mention teammates in ticket comments.
label: feature

title: Custom priority rules
body: Administrators want to define custom rules for priority assignment.
label: feature

title: Export triage history
body: Product owners want to export triage history for reporting.
label: feature

title: Add SSO integration
body: The application should support single sign-on for internal users.
label: feature

title: Create audit dashboard
body: Managers need a dashboard to review AI suggestion overrides.
label: feature

title: How do I reset my password?
body: A user asks how to reset the password for the internal portal.
label: question

title: What is the difference between bug and requirement?
body: A team member asks how tickets should be categorized.
label: question

title: How is ticket priority calculated?
body: A user wants to understand how the priority score is determined.
label: question

title: Can I reopen a closed ticket?
body: A reporter asks whether resolved tickets can be reopened.
label: question

title: Which team handles billing incidents?
body: A user asks which internal team owns payment-related problems.
label: question

title: Where can I see audit logs?
body: A stakeholder asks where triage decision changes are visible.
label: question

title: Is the platform mobile friendly?
body: A manager asks whether the web interface works on mobile devices.
label: question

title: How do I assign a ticket manually?
body: A new support agent asks how to assign a ticket to a team.
label: question

title: Can attachments be added later?
body: A user asks if files can be uploaded after ticket creation.
label: question

title: What does AI confidence mean?
body: A reviewer asks how to interpret the confidence score.
label: question

title: Need support with account access
body: The user cannot access the account and needs assistance from support.
label: support

title: Help needed for report export
body: A user needs help exporting a report from the dashboard.
label: support

title: Support request for failed import
body: The customer needs support because CSV import does not complete.
label: support

title: Need help configuring notifications
body: A user asks support for help setting up email notifications.
label: support

title: Assistance required for team setup
body: A new manager needs help creating and configuring a team.
label: support

title: Support needed after role change
body: A user lost access after a role update and needs assistance.
label: support

title: Help with dashboard permissions
body: The reporter cannot access analytics and asks for support.
label: support

title: Need assistance with SSO login
body: A user needs support because single sign-on login is unclear.
label: support

title: Support request for duplicate tickets
body: The team asks for help understanding duplicate ticket handling.
label: support

title: Help needed to update profile
body: A user needs support updating their personal account profile.
label: support

title: Clarify acceptance criteria for export feature
body: The request needs clearer acceptance criteria before implementation.
label: requirement

title: Requirement for audit trail retention
body: The system must retain audit logs for at least twelve months.
label: requirement

title: Need role-based access control
body: The platform must support role-based permissions for enterprise teams.
label: requirement

title: Requirement for multilingual UI
body: The application must support English and German user interfaces.
label: requirement

title: Need configurable workflow states
body: Administrators must be able to configure workflow states.
label: requirement

title: Requirement for duplicate detection
body: The platform must identify similar tickets during intake.
label: requirement

title: Need reporting for SLA breaches
body: The system must report SLA violations for critical tickets.
label: requirement

title: Requirement for data export
body: Users must be able to export tickets in CSV format.
label: requirement

title: Need traceability for triage decisions
body: The application must store who changed a triage decision and why.
label: requirement

title: Requirement for team assignment rules
body: The system must support deterministic routing rules by ticket category.
label: requirement
